name: Goldman Credit Solutions
description_short: Goldman Credit Solutions disputes negative items on credit reports and provides credit education. They charge $89/month with no contracts and guarantee removal of 25% of items or money back.
description_long:
Goldman Credit Solutions is a credit repair firm based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, operating since at least 2017. They position themselves as a legal-focused credit restoration company that works directly with credit bureaus and creditors to challenge negative reporting items affecting consumer credit scores.

The company offers a monthly credit restoration package at $89/month that includes three-bureau credit analysis, unlimited disputes, credit education, 24/7 client portal access, monthly progress updates, and customer support. They claim to specialize in removing late payments, collection items, student loan defaults, repossessions, medical bills, bankruptcies, and judgments. Their stated process involves a free consultation and credit analysis, followed by dispute filing while clients monitor real-time progress through their portal.

Goldman differentiates itself primarily through pricing transparency (low fixed monthly rate), no binding contracts, cancel-anytime flexibility, and a money-back guarantee if they cannot remove at least 25% of worked-on items. They emphasize staff expertise in disputing and removing negative items legally, and promote a "Rapid 10X Validation System" as their methodology, though specific details about this system are not provided.

However, the company makes several claims that warrant skepticism. Credit repair companies cannot legally do anything consumers cannot do themselves—the Fair Credit Reporting Act allows free disputes directly with bureaus. Guaranteeing credit score improvements within 30-45 days oversimplifies a process dependent on bureaus' response timelines and dispute validity. The money-back guarantee specifically requires only 25% item removal, a threshold substantially lower than complete resolution. Client testimonials lack verifiable details. The website provides no information about legal credentials, Better Business Bureau standing, or regulatory compliance documentation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Low transparent pricing at $89/month with no long-term contracts
No cancellation fees; can cancel with 3 days advance notice
Money-back guarantee if they cannot remove at least 25% of disputed items
24/7 client portal access for real-time status tracking on dispute progress
Unlimited disputes included in monthly service (no per-dispute fees)
Offers free initial consultation and credit analysis before signup
Includes credit education/coaching to help clients maintain scores independently
cons: Money-back guarantee only requires 25% item removal—a low threshold that may not substantially improve credit scores
Advertises 30-45 day results, but credit bureau disputes typically take 30-45 days just for initial response, making timeline claims unrealistic
Website provides no verifiable information about staff credentials, legal expertise, or regulatory compliance (no BBB link, licensing details, or attorney certifications)
Makes broad claims ("we specialize in removing bankruptcies") that may be misleading—bankruptcy removal is governed by statute and timing, not disputable by credit repair companies
No documentation of success rates or methodology details for the advertised "Rapid 10X Validation System"
best_for: Consumers with multiple negative items (late payments, collections, medical bills) who want ongoing dispute management without a contract
Budget-conscious credit repair seekers willing to accept a lower removal guarantee in exchange for affordable monthly payments
People who want credit education alongside dispute services to prevent future credit damage
Clients seeking flexibility and the ability to cancel if results don't materialize within 3 months
diagnosis: Goldman Credit Solutions is best for budget-conscious consumers seeking dispute management without contracts who can accept a modest 25% removal guarantee. Primary caveat: the 30-45 day timeline claims conflict with actual credit bureau dispute processing periods, and the company provides no verifiable credentials, regulatory information, or transparent success metrics beyond client testimonials—critical omissions for credit repair services which operate in a heavily regulated industry.
services: Three-bureau credit report audit and analysis
Unlimited credit disputes with credit bureaus and creditors
Removal of late payments, collections, and charge-offs
Student loan default dispute and removal
Medical bill removal from credit reports
24/7 client portal with real-time dispute status tracking
Monthly credit score and report updates
Customer support via phone and email
Money-back guarantee if 25% of items not removed
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
